publications.title: Designing Dialogic Feedback with Generative AI in Studio Classrooms
publications.abstract: We prototype conversational feedback companions that help students reflect on creative work without replacing human mentorship.

publications.title: Community Data Notebooks for Participatory Sensemaking
publications.abstract: Community-aligned data notebooks make complex civic datasets legible, actionable, and contestable for educators and organizers.

publications.title: Narrative Interfaces for Storytelling with Institutional Memory
publications.abstract: Interactive story maps connect oral histories with archival records to foreground community agency in institutional storytelling.

publications.title: Speculative Studios: Co-designing Futures of Intelligent Tutoring
publications.abstract: A speculative co-design methodology for imagining sociotechnical futures of intelligent tutoring in partnership with educators.
